content.text: I'll help you check the Node.js version of your app on Mittwald. Let me start by listing your projects and apps to see what you have.
Now let me list the apps in this project:
I see you don't currently have any apps deployed in your project. Let me check what Node.js versions are available on Mittwald that you can use:

Perfect! Here's what I found:

## Your Mittwald Setup
- **Project**: mStudio MCP server (p-ptwfms)
- **Apps**: You currently have no apps deployed

## Available Node.js Versions on Mittwald
Mittwald offers **30 Node.js versions** ranging from:
- **Oldest**: v16.15.1
- **Latest**: v24.7.0 (marked as **recommended**)
- **Other LTS versions**: v18.20.4, v20.19.4, v22.19.0

The recommended version is **Node.js 24.7.0**, which is the latest LTS version available on the platform.

### Key Versions Available:
- Node.js 16.x (EOL versions)
- Node.js 18.x (LTS) - up to 18.20.4
- Node.js 20.x (LTS) - up to 20.19.4
- Node.js 22.x (LTS) - up to 22.19.0
- Node.js 23.x
- Node.js 24.x (LTS) - up to 24.7.0 ⭐ **Recommended**

If you want to deploy a Node.js app or check the version of an existing app, I can help you create or update it. Just let me know what you'd like to do!
